chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 526 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.4401/2025 2. For orders as to maintainability of petition 03.03.2025 Mr. Aamir Zaheer, advocate for the petitioner 1. Urgency granted. 2. On the last date learned counsel for the petitioner was confronted as to the maintainability. Perusal of the prayer clauses demonstrates that the petition prima facie misconceived. Today he remains unable to assist inter alia as to how a writ can be sought against a private individual, how negative declaration can be granted in the present facts and circumstances and / or how this matter can be adjudicated without recourse of evidence etc. Petition found to be misconceived is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Amjad
